author: Aalind Tiwari
name: Depth Recurrence + LeakyReLU² + TTT + Parallel Muon
blurb: Combining depth recurrence (layers 4,5 repeated — 11 physical to 13 virtual layers) with LeakyReLU squared activation and Legal TTT on the PR#549 stack. Depth recurrence adds model expressivity for near-zero parameter cost. Built on PR#549 and PR#686 approaches.
